Node.help: Top level object which describes an aptixia test configuration. This includes elements such as such as portcpu network stack configurations, ixia chassis/port allocations, etc.

PropertyBoolean.name: rebootPortsBeforeConfigure
PropertyBoolean.description: Reboot ports prior to configuring a test when true
PropertyBoolean.help: Reboot ports prior to configuring a test when true. This can take a while depending on the test configuration.

PropertyInt.name: testDuration
PropertyInt.help: This is the expected test duration which is set by the application.

PropertyBoolean.name: checkLinkState
PropertyBoolean.description: Check link state when configuring a test.
PropertyBoolean.help: Check link state during the test configuration process. If the link state is down, an exception is thrown and configuration process is cancelled.

PropertyNodeList.name: portGroupList
PropertyNodeList.help: Contains the list of all the PortGroups associated with this test.

PropertyNode.name: chassisConfig
PropertyNode.help: Contains all the ixia hardware chassis resources that have been allocated for use with a test.

PropertyNodeList.name: statSourcesList
PropertyNodeList.help: Describes all the statistic sources available in this test.

PropertyNodeList.name: activityModels
PropertyNodeList.help: The list of activity models associated with this test. See ActivityModelInstance for more info.

Method2.name: ImportItsConfig
Method2.help: Import an .its configuration file generated by the ixia 'Applifier' application into this test configuration.

Argument.name: itsLines
Argument.help: The .its file data to be imported

Argument.name: warningMessages
Argument.help: List of warnings that occured during the importing process.

Method2.name: GetPluginList
Method2.help: Returns a list of plugin names depending on the directories in data/stackelementplugins.

Argument.name: pluginList
Argument.help: StringVector that has the names of the plugins

Method2.name: TestConfigure
Method2.help: Take the test server through the configuration phase of a test.

Method2.name: TestDeconfigure
Method2.help: Take the test server through the de-configuration phase of a test.

Method2.name: TestStart
Method2.help: Starts a test, once it's been configured

Method2.name: TestStop
Method2.help: Stops a test which has been started via the 'TestStart' method

Enum.name: eEventType
Enum.help: The general states that a test can pass though during it's lifetime.

Struct.name: EventData
Struct.help: The event information that is delivered with test model SystemEvents.

Member.name: eventType
Member.help: The type of event being delivered, e.g., 'kFsmEnteredStateDeconfigStack'

Event.name: SystemEvent
Event.help: The data block used to deliver general system events generated by this test.

Struct.name: TestInfo
Struct.help: This structure holds information about a test.

Member.name: userName
Member.help: The username associated with the test.

Member.name: sessionName
Member.help: The username associated with the test.

Method2.name: GetTestInfo
Method2.help: Get general information Associated with the test.

Argument.name: testInfo
Argument.help: The return area for the information collected by this method. See TestInfo definition in this object for more info.

Argument.name: newPortWatch
Argument.help: Output parameter containing the requested 'PortWatch' object. See the 'PortWatch' object for more info.

Method2.name: CreateChassisWatch
Method2.help: Returns a new PortWatch instance that will watch for HwManager/IxServer down/up events. The PortWatch.EventList is ignored, on this watch only events of type kLink will be sent. The PortWatch.portList must contain port unique Ids as chassis;0;0 for HwManager state events, or chassis;-1;-1 for IxServer state events, or both.

Argument.name: newChassisWatch
Argument.help: Output parameter containing the requested 'PortWatch' object. See the 'PortWatch' object for more info.

Enum.name: eActionBehavior
Enum.help:
Each Smart Config Action will have a behavior modifer that can be one of the following (enumerative) values:
kActionBehaviorSmart -
( the default value ) conditionally perform the action. Action is not performed if it's determined to be redundant
kActionBehaviorAlways -
Always perform the action , regardless of previous configuration actions
kActionBehaviorNever -
Never perform the action, regardless of previous configuration actions.

Enum.name: eAction
Enum.help:
kActionTakeOwnership -
kActionConfigurePhysical -
The act of setting of the physical/layer1 attributes on the card specific portions of a TestServer HardwarePlugin for each card associated with a portGroup. This is done via HardwareManager.
kActionApplicationDOD -
The Act of loading/starting/stopping/unloading Application Defined remote Dod Packages for a particular portGroup in a TestServer portGroupList. This is done via HardwareManager.
kActionApplicationDODUnload -
The Act of unloading Application Defined remote Dod Packages for a particular portGroup in a TestServer portGroupList. This is done via HardwareManager. (note only never acutally does anything)
kActionConfigureStack -
The act of processing StackElementPlugin attributes into portcpu Layer plugin instructions that are applied to each port in a portGroup. This is done via InterfaceManager.

Method2.name: GetActionBehavior
Method2.help: Get the behavior associated with the supplied (test) action

Argument.name: action
Argument.help: Action to get the behavior for

Argument.name: behavior
Argument.help: The type of behavior associated with the action

Method2.name: SetActionBehavior
Method2.help: Set the behavior associated with for a test action

Method2.name: SetActionBehaviorForAllActions
Method2.help: Set an action behavior type for all actions in the test

Argument.name: behavior
Argument.help: Behavior to apply to all actions to
